title: VNNhatTruongneee's Crosshair Addons
description: A sophisticated, combat-focused utility that dynamically enhances crosshair feedback for precision PvP, developed by VNNhatTruongneee to optimize player engagement and reach accuracy in Minecraft.
body:
# 🎯 VNNhatTruongneee's Crosshair Addons

![Minecraft Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.11-brightgreen)

![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-CC--BY--NC--SA--4.0-orange)

![Platform](https://img.shields.io/badge/Platform-Fabric%20%7C%20NeoForge-blue)

A powerful extension for crosshairs, optimizing observation and reflexes in PvP matches.

---

## 🌟 Introduction
**VNNhatTruongneee's Crosshair Addons** is developed by **VNNhatTruongneee**. This mod focuses on improving the user experience through intelligent visual feedback directly on the crosshair, helping you better control distance and targets.

## 🔥 Key Features

### ⚔️ Smart Combat Indicator
This is the main feature that helps you never miss a decisive shot:
* **Automatic color change:** The crosshair will turn **bright red** when you look at another player.

* **Reach Check:** Red only appears when the target is within attack range.

* **Benefit:** Helps you know exactly when to click without having to guess the distance.


## ⚙️ System Requirements
For optimal mod performance on version **1.21.11**, you need to install the following dependencies:
1. [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) (Required)
2. [VNNhatTruongneeeLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/vnnhattruongneeelib) (Required)
3. [Fabric Kotlin Language](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin/) (Required)
4. [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) (Required)



## 📜 License
This project uses the **CC-BY-NC-SA 4.0** license.

* **Attribution:** You must credit VNNhatTruongneee as the author.

* **Non-Commercial:** Not for commercial use.

* **ShareAlike:** Modifications must be shared under this license.

---
*Developed by **VNNhatTruongneee** with a passion for the Vietnamese Minecraft community.*
